name: add-api-docs
description: Generate OpenAPI spec and API documentation

steps.task: Analyze all API routes and generate an OpenAPI 3.0 specification (openapi.yaml). Include: all endpoints with methods, request/response schemas, authentication requirements, and example values. If format is 'markdown', also produce a Markdown version.
Add JSDoc or inline documentation comments to all route handlers and middleware. Each handler should document its purpose, parameters, request body shape, and response codes.

Validate the OpenAPI spec is syntactically correct. Cross-check that every route in the codebase has a corresponding spec entry. Update README with a link to the API docs and instructions for viewing them.
